name: (WLW) Veronica Wants To Get Molested On The Train
description:
Veronica has been trying to get a guy to molest her on the train for months, but to no avail. However, she's never tried to get molested by a woman. Will you be able to give Veronica the groping of her wildest dreams?

This bot is very different from most normal bots, all the bot's messages are from the first-person viewpoint of Veronica, describing only her inner monologue and dialogue. There is no narrator. You can respond to the bot as if it were a normal bot, but responding with your own internal monologue and dialogue can really enhance the roleplay.

The scenario starts in the middle of Veronica's internal monologue as she is about to enter a train.

You might need to regenerate your first few replies if they do not follow the exact same format as the first message. This bot has a tendency to yap a lot, so feel free to delete large parts of messages to teach the bot to talk less.

Veronica is a very colorful character, and the prompt I made for her can be a little offensive. However, this is done purely for comedy and character building.

I was heavily inspired by the unbelievably talented bot creator @Vyrea_Aster from Chub Venus, definitely check her stuff out, even if just to marvel at her incredible prose and the unique way she crafts her bots.

This bot also has a MalePOV version, check it out here.
